page_content: ENEE150 Intermediate Programming Concepts for Engineers (3 Credits) Advanced programming concepts: coding conventions and style; pointers; dynamic memory allocation and data structures; linked lists; graphs; abstract data types; object-oriented design. There will be team- based software projects and group presentations. Prerequisite: Permission of ENGR-Electrical & Computer Engineering department. And ENEE140 or CMSC131; or score of 5 on the A Java AP exam; or score of 4 or 5 on the AB Java AP exam; or satisfactory performance on the department's placement exam. Corequisite: MATH140. Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Electrical program.
